scripts.eval: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_articles.py
scripts.eval:quick: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python run_eval.py --articles 1 2 3
scripts.eval:agent: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_agent.py
scripts.eval:judge: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_llm_judge.py
scripts.eval:synthesize: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run python synthesize.py
scripts.eval:synthetic: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_synthetic.py
scripts.eval:all: cd evals && DEEPEVAL_TELEMETRY_OPT_OUT=YES uv run deepeval test run test_articles.py test_agent.py test_llm_judge.py test_synthetic.py
